title: Representation of a 3x4 Two-Dimensional Array in Memory
description: A visual explanation of how a 2D array is stored in row-major and column-major order in contiguous memory locations, showing the memory address calculation for each element.
elements: Address Calculation Formulas (Base Address, Element Size, Row Index, Column Index)
relationships: Grid elements map to sequential memory addresses
Formulas show how to calculate the memory location of any element A[i][j] based on the chosen ordering scheme
